fields.label: Configuration Name
fields.description: Unique name for this import configuration

fields.label: Description
fields.description: Description of what this import configuration is used for

fields.label: Enabled
fields.description: Enable or disable this import configuration

fields.label: Source System
fields.description: Source system this import is associated with

fields.label: Target DocType
fields.options:
Product Master
Product Variant
Digital Asset
Brand
Manufacturer
Product Family
Taxonomy Node
fields.description: The DocType to import data into

fields.label: File Format
fields.description: Format of the import file

fields.label: File Encoding
fields.description: Character encoding of the import file

fields.label: CSV Delimiter
fields.description: Column delimiter for CSV/TSV files

fields.label: Quote Character
fields.description: Character used to quote fields containing special characters

fields.label: Has Header Row
fields.description: First row contains column headers

fields.label: Skip Rows
fields.description: Number of rows to skip at the beginning of the file

fields.label: JSON Root Path
fields.description: JSONPath to the array of records (e.g., $.data.products)

fields.label: XML Record XPath
fields.description: XPath to the record elements (e.g., //Product)

fields.label: Sheet Name
fields.description: Name of the sheet to import (default: first sheet)

fields.label: Field Mappings
fields.description: Map source fields to target fields

fields.label: Identifier Field
fields.description: Field used to identify existing records (e.g., sku, external_id)

fields.label: Identifier Source Field
fields.description: Source field containing the identifier value (if different from target field name)

fields.label: Duplicate Handling
fields.options:
Update Existing
Skip Duplicates
Create New
Fail on Duplicate
fields.description: How to handle records that already exist

fields.label: Update Only Empty Fields
fields.description: Only update fields that are currently empty in the target record

fields.label: Validate Before Import
fields.description: Validate all records before importing (dry run first)

fields.label: Stop on Error
fields.description: Stop import when an error occurs (otherwise continue with remaining records)

fields.label: Max Errors Before Stop
fields.description: Maximum number of errors before stopping import (0 = unlimited)

fields.label: Skip Invalid Rows
fields.description: Skip rows that fail validation instead of failing the entire import

fields.label: Log Skipped Rows
fields.description: Log details of skipped rows for review

fields.label: Validate Required Fields
fields.description: Check that all required fields have values

fields.label: Batch Size
fields.description: Number of records to process in each batch

fields.label: Run in Background
fields.description: Process import as a background job

fields.label: Notify on Complete
fields.description: Send notification when import completes

fields.label: Notification Email
fields.description: Email address for import notifications

fields.label: Create PIM Events
fields.description: Create PIM Events for imported/updated records

fields.label: Trim Whitespace
fields.description: Remove leading/trailing whitespace from all text values

fields.label: Normalize Unicode
fields.description: Normalize Unicode characters (NFC normalization)

fields.label: Treat Empty as Null
fields.description: Treat empty strings as null values

fields.label: Strip HTML Tags
fields.description: Remove HTML tags from text fields

fields.label: Pre-Import Script
fields.description: Python script to run before each record is imported. Available: row, frappe

fields.label: Post-Import Script
fields.description: Python script to run after each record is imported. Available: doc, row, frappe

fields.label: Default Locale
fields.description: Default locale for imported attribute values

fields.label: Default Channel
fields.description: Default channel for imported attribute values

fields.label: Default Product Type
fields.description: Default product type for new products

fields.label: Default Product Family
fields.description: Default product family for new products

fields.label: Total Imports
fields.description: Total number of import runs

fields.label: Total Records Imported
fields.description: Total number of records successfully imported

fields.label: Total Records Updated
fields.description: Total number of records updated

fields.label: Total Records Skipped
fields.description: Total number of records skipped due to errors

fields.label: Total Errors
fields.description: Total number of errors across all imports

fields.label: Last Import At
fields.description: Timestamp of last import run

fields.label: Last Import Status
fields.options:
Pending
In Progress
Completed
Completed with Errors
Failed
fields.description: Status of the last import run

fields.label: Last Import File
fields.description: Filename of the last imported file

fields.label: Records in Last Import
fields.description: Number of records in the last import

fields.label: Successful in Last Import
fields.description: Number of successful records in last import

fields.label: Errors in Last Import
fields.description: Number of errors in last import

fields.label: Last Import Duration (seconds)
fields.description: Duration of last import in seconds

fields.label: Last Error Log
fields.description: Error details from the last import
